MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to CCP 583.210 and 583.250. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
